Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class WebStoreBundle

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.WebStoreBundle
public class WebStoreBundle extends Metadata

Java class for WebStoreBundle complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="WebStoreBundle">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="autoFacetingEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="cartToOrderAutoCustomFieldMapping" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="commerceEinsteinActivitiesTracked" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="commerceEinsteinDeployed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="country" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}CountryIsoCode" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="defaultCurrency" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="defaultLanguage" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="defaultTaxLocaleType" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}TaxLocaleType"/>
         <element name="description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="guestBrowsingEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="guestCartTimeToLive" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="label" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="orderLifeCycleType" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}OrderLifeCycleType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="pricingStrategy" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}PricingStrategy"/>
         <element name="productGrouping" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ProductGrouping" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="skipAdditionalEntitlementCheckForSearch" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="storeName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="supportedCurrencies" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="supportedLanguages" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="supportedShipToCountries" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="type" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}WebStoreType"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
